reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros malisima, andenes libres te ubicas para cargar y te dicen vaya a la otra  fila ya que la tapita esta del otro lado. No pueden estirar la manguera. Ambiente de trabajo tipo empleado publico, velocidad de atención lenta y sin muchas ganas. Le pedí para limpiar los vidrios, no había. Pleno centro de neuquen super concurrida y trabajan de esa forma.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is terrible. You stand on empty platforms to load, and they tell you to go to the other line since the cap is on the other side. They can't extend the hose. It's a civil servant-type work environment, slow and unenthusiastic. I asked someone to clean the windows, but there wasn't one. The center of Neuquén is super busy, and they work that way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMGFMcmdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace una semana fui a cargar nafta con mi moto, el señor (hombre grande) ya vino con mala predisposición a atender, al pedirle que ya no cargara mas nafta por que me estaba salpicando el tanque saco el pico como estaba y me chorreo nafta en el tanque de la moto (4700 km realizados mas de 25 cargas y solo en esta estación tuve problemas) tampoco pude sumar puntos a la YPF Servicblub por que según este señor no funcionaba, realmente una pésima atención menos mal que son "EL ACA" si no... no se lo que me esperaba fue el miércoles 10 de febrero cerca de las 20 hs, un hombre grande. Para que algún encargado le pregunte que problema tenia ese dia y le explique que los clientes no tenemos la culpa...

(Translated by Google)
A week ago I went to fill up my motorcycle with gas. The man (a large man) was already in a bad mood. When I asked him to stop because the gas was splashing onto my tank, he pulled out the nozzle as it was and squirted gas into my motorcycle's tank (I've traveled 4700 km and filled up more than 25 times, and this is the only station where I've had problems). I also couldn't get points for the YPF Service Club because, according to him, it wasn't working. Truly terrible service. Thank goodness they're "El Aca" (the ACA station), otherwise... I don't know what I was expecting. It was Wednesday, February 10th, around 8 pm, and another large man. I wish a manager could ask him what the problem was that day and explain that the customers aren't to blame...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ejU3M1p3EAE
